titleStmt.title: SII 29.118: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 118. (A.R. No. B. 787 of 1962-63.) HARSŪR, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup against the wall inside the Boslingēśvara temple.
It carries a very long genealogical account of the family of Kalachūris and states that the king Rāyamurāri Sōvidēva was ruling over the empire from the capital Mādiganūru.

It records grant of the village Ankulage for the worship of the god and repairs of the temple of Bhōgēśvaradēva by mahāpradhāna, sēnādhipati, bāhattara niyōgādhipati, hiriya daṇḍanāyaka Mādhavayya-nāyaka along with mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Vīra kāmadēvarasa and Vīra Goṅkarasa. Also it registers further grant of an oilmill, income from the sale of arecca-nut, pepper etc and land.

The village Ankulage is the same as Ankulage of Bāḍa situated with in the administrative division Goṅka-nūrippat-taṟuvattu [120+60=180 viz, Goṅka-180]. River Beṇṇeyatoṟe is mentioned as one of the boundary lines of the granted village. The grant was received by Hariharajīya, the āchārya of the temple.
The record is dated in the cyclic year Khara, Māgha, śu. Huṇṇime, Thursday corresponding to 1172 A.D., January 13, Thursday. Lunar eclipse occured on the previous day January 12, Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmahōdāta cakravarttiya pratiṣṭheyeṁ śrībhōgēśvara dēvanirtthi sarvanamasyahita(vā) girpparu © bhōgēśvaradēva
ramaṁṭapamurmmāḍidaga(vi)goṁjaga(re)ṁbādēvara dēgulada(le)bidda kaḍadude nyēdhāṟeveṁbāṁ
svasti śrījayaścā rbhudayaśca . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . śrīkadu gītamarudagra śrīvallabhaniradā nāmāditija vijaya śrī vamagupāyaṁ manevā kśrī valla
bha naḷa vēdāgaḷa liṁgadalāḷupaṁ . neledu surāsura kaḍeya liṁgadaliṁdāgadaṁ nijāṁśu saṁstara paripū
ritākhiḷa diśāvaḷayaṁ kamaḷāsa vīradharaṁ suragaja sōdaraṁ śaśitaḍiya kuḷābharaṇa kaḷāpta śaṁkara vararādaraṁdu ci
tabhadra kuḷābharaṇarmmāhībhujar . Antaparoḷākhiḷā vasudhā kāṁtācitanucita nāḷda nakhiḷāvaniyaṁ santamenetatta nū
jana navaravasagarasanāḷda nakhiḷārvchareyaṁ . tattaneyaṁka (nvā)manṛpanuttaṁ biḷināḷda niḷeyaṁnātana tanayaṁ matta (ki)
duttamarene rāja bijjarāgedarttanayar . mallikāmāle . Aṁtavikramadiṁda vāḷdiḷeyaṁ nimi(dbi)
yatigaḷaṁtaku nāgi bijjanṛpāḷakaṁ gāgidaṁ sutaṁkantu vairi varaprasāda sulabdha dōrvvaḷadhairyya vikrānta vānō
ṇḍa kīrttiyenippa nṛpājaḷakaṁ . Āka(rṇṇa) nṛpati gāgadakhiḷākarṇṇita viśadakīrti bhōga marā(ṇaṁ) śrī bhū
kāṁta nenisi negaḷdana na vijaya nijabhuja vaṣaṁcala . Ā jōgamaṁge maganudvajita ripucakra nārjitārjjita
tējōbrājiṣṇu jiṣṇu vikrama ya prathita pṛthubhujaṁ permmāḍi . Ā permmāḍi nṛpāḷaṁgā pādita sakaḷa kuṁ
taḷavirājyaṁ vyapādita cāḷukya va . nābhija (pa)ṁ . Ā pāḻitane pāḷa mahīpāḷaka nākramārtta kaḷidā
rakṣmāpāḷa rājyanatibaḷa
gāḷaṁ keḷalaridapa dinadaṭiṁ poḷaladāraḷamebijja bhōjapāḷakan . Ātaṁge pratima pra
mra bhūpavrajō pātaṁgaduta vikramyēkaniḷayaṁ sājamēśvaraṁ puṭṭi tattātaṁgemmige leṁbinaṁ ripubaḷākrāṁtakṣarō
bhāgamaṁ mātenāntadaṭi barppaḍallaḍu vinaṁniḥ kaṁṭaka māḍidaṁ . vacana . tatpratāpa mentene . neṭṭanerāyaṁ
murārige paṭṭaṁgaṭṭipudegaḷdu vairi nṛpāḷarttoṭṭu neḍegeṭṭu bāyveṭṭaṭṭida rātmīḻ karituraṁgātkara maṁ .
balavajrāyamurāri sōma nṛpati prasthāna citiravaṁ nelanākaṁpisalaṇmi vairigaḷa dirddāḍiṁdaraṇyaṁ
gaḷa kelarāḷdakkelarāḍidakkelarusirbbiṭṭa kelarttarggida kelaraḍḍakkerarggidakkelaraḍaṁgirdda rkkelarmmaggidal . Aṁga nṛ
pāḷakāṁ gajamahēśvara naṁdra nṛpēṁdra mattamātaṁga mṛrggādhipaṁ capaḷa cōḷa nṛpācaḷa vajra pā
ttanuttuṁga kaḷiṁgarāja rajanīcara rāghava rāmanendudinneṁgaḷa baṇṇisallamege gōcaranā prabhu sōmabhūbhujaṁ .
kaḷacuri cakravartti vibhudōrvvaḷa mallanenippa sōma bhūtaḷa pativādiyādrita mahītaḷamaṁ parirakṣisutta nā
kuḷamige daṁḍanāyaka śikhāmaṇi mādhavanāḷdanīdharātaḷamā Ā sāvaṁtatu mannedaḍi ḻdāda Atidīranēkavēśamaṁ .
Ā daṁḍādhipānvaya meṁtene . sarasīruhanābhanābhī sarasīruha vibhagaḍana jana jaṁgātmamanaḥ sarasīruha jananāthaṁ suraLetter ha is written below the line.
muni samabiṣṭutaṁ vasiṣṭha munīṁdraṁ . Ānimittaṁ muniditta śāpadi nimikṣmāpāḷakaṁ gāytu tattanuhinatvama
dāyakauśika balākya śrīkāḷadaḷtaṁdu tammaniyaṣṭyāgniyoḷādudāhuti pāleṁdandanya sāmānyenē munīrvvaraṁ
dāvaṁdita padadvaṁdvaṁ vasiṣṭhāhvayaṁ . Ā munipāncayagagana nabhōmaṇiyaṇṇama camū
panā vibhusūtanuddhānuyaśaḥparipūrṇṇa vyōmataḷaṁ viṣṇudēvara rathaninādaṁ . Ā viśva vinū
takīrttivallabhanenipa viṣṇugāgadaṁ tanayaṁ bhūvaḷaya vitatakīrtti śrīvallabhanenisi māyeda vacaryē
paṁ . Ā māyidēva vipra śirōmaṇi gati vimaḷa caritācāryyaṁ padamaṁ pramaditaḷadathuḷa cintāmaṇi sāvitridē
vi sapatiratnaṁ . Ā sāvitri satigaṁ bhū surapati māyedēvapṛta nā patigaṁ vāragava vibhavaṁ puṭṭidanā saka
ḷaṁ pogaḷeredava dvajaniśaṁ . vacana . Ā mahānubhāva saccarita mentene . kaḷacurinṛpa kuḷa (rā)jyaṁ baḷavaḍḍurmmaṁtriṁ kasapha
yādigaḷiradaṁgaḷa kuḷamādirē nijadōrbbaḷa diṁdaḷavaḍisi mādhavaṁ pesarvaḍedaṁ . Adentene . Ākramisi rājyalaLetter dha is written below the line.
kṣmīyana kramadiṁdāḷda kaṇnanaṁ koṁdudharācakramanaḷavaḍisiṭṭa nanukramadiṁ gāmanṛpaṁ nabhuja maṁḍaḷa do
ḷā . baḷavavripu saṁharaṇaṁ kaḷacuri bhūpāḷa vipuḷa rājyōddharaṇaṁ viḷasacchāryyā caraṇaṁ kuḷakudarasthira namātya
gajapaṁcāsyaṁ . ripu pādānidhi bāḍavaṁ ripuvanaprōddhāma dāvānaḷaṁ ripumēgha samiraṇaṁ ripumahīcṛ
tkhaṁḍa nākhaṁḍaḷa ripupaṁkaja sitaprabhū ripumadacaṁdrā(rka) paṁcānanaṁ ripu kōḷāhaḷakaṁdāḍapogaḷpudā śrīmādhavā mātya
naṁ . Ā saciva patige vipuḷa śrī satiyuṁtānumā camūpati vakṣa vāsiniya(ṁte)nisi negaḷda mahāsati sati
yādaḷ sāvarikaḻadēvi . satiyantē pativratāvāksatiyantekaḷā kaḷāpa kōvida lakṣmī satiyantadiśa vakṣa
sthita mēkaladēviyaṁdu pogaḷpudulōkaṁ . gadya svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārāPunctuations is
jādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjara puravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarnna vṛṣabhadhvajaṁ rūpamakara dhvajaṁ kaḷacūreya ku
ḷakamaḷa mārttāṁḍaṁ kadana pracaṁḍaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirrvōṣaṇa vairikuḷa bhīṣaṇaṁ śaraṇāgata ga
ja sāmaṁta vajrapaṁjaraṁ vairidikkuṁjaraṁ pratāpa laṁkēśvaraṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkuśaṁ nāmādi pra
śasti sahitaṁ śrīmadrāyamurāri sōyidēva vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire mādiganūra nelevīḍinōḷsukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamire tatpā
da padmōpajīviyappa śrī manmahā pradhānaṁ sēnādhipati bāhattara niyōgādhipati hiriya daṁḍa
nāyaka mādava(yya) nāyakaṁ svastisamadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kopaṇapura
varādhīśvaraṁ nābhirājānvayāṁ bhōjadivākaraṁ satyaratnākaraṁ śrī madalaṁdeya sōmanāthadēvalabdha varaprasāda
maḷāmōdaṁ manneyasiṁhaṁ manneya baṁgāṟaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara mallidēva naṁka
kāṟaṁ nāmādi praśasti sahitaṁ śrī manmahā maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīrakāmadēvarasanuṁ vīra goṁkarasanuṁ
Iṁtivarirbbaru sahitamāgi śrīmatsarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ śāṁbhusiguḷa śrībhōgēśvara dēvaraAṁga
bhōga raṁgabhōgakkaṁ caitrapavitrakaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ goṁkanūṟippattaṟuvattara baḷi
ya bāḍadaṁkulageyaṁ khara saṁvacarada māgha śuddha paurṇṇamāsya bṛhaspati vāradaṁdu sōmagrahaṇa nimitta dhāWords 'sOmagrahaNa nimitta' are written in small letters below the line.
rāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanamasyamāgi koṭṭa(ru) . Āgrāma sīme yeṁteṁdaḍe
vaṇṇiṁ tāṟiṁmakke teṁkalaḷeya haḷaṁ mēre Ā haḷḷadiṁ paḍumu kha loḷu naṭṭakallu mēre Alliṁ baḍaga mā
gadhātri puruṣa Ibaḍalavaravāḍiya sīmaiyanāḷdamaraṁ mēre Alliṁ paḍuva mukhadiṁbare nairutyada kāḻinalli A
paravāḍiya kaggalla moraḷeyaṁ kulageya mugguḷaṁ neṭṭa kavileya kallumēre paḍuvalaḍḍa veṭṭidiṁ keḷagiḍuda gu
ttimariṁ vāyuvyadalu hūvina hekhkharaṇe mēre baḍagalu bimmātipaḷḷada mēre Īśānyadalli yā haḷḷa
da beṇṇeya toṟeya kūḍalalli naṭṭa kallumēre . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhi va
rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . gāmē kāṁratnikāmē kā bhūme rāpu kamaṁgulaṁ harasmara kamō
pnōtiyāṁvadā bhūta saṁṣavaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nṛpāṇāṁ kāle kāle pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvā nētānbāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā nbhūyō bhūyō yācate rāmacaṁdraḥ . Iṁtī sthāna ma nūrjjitaṁ
māḍi paḍedācāryyaṁ harihara jīyaṁge maṁgaḷaṁ . mattamā bhōgēśvara dēvarige dēsi ga
ḷuṁ nakharaṁgaḷuṁ koṭṭayī gāṇadalaḍḍa sālageyeṇṇe ge māṟidaḍakeyaliyayda ḍake hēṟiṁgippatto
ṁmdule (bhatta)dali koṭṭivara lōmānaṁ koṇḍamattaṟa mānaṁ meṇasu jīrage hoṁge ya hāga ma
ttamā nāḍiyiṁ baṁdakeymattaru Ūra kōṇinali dara suttuṁnaṭṭa kallugaḷe(re) . Ā
da prabhu heggaḍegauḍana mallibīra gauḍa ma yā prabhutvada dalli vaṣṭaṁ bāḍa
manayaṣṭa baṁdada keyvanuṁḍa rā prabhugaḷuṁ kāpāḍuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 29.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
